designDependencies.reason: Self-contained color token migration. No dependencies.
AC-77 requires AC-71 to be complete first since it extracts the component that AC-71 fixes.
New shared constant file. Independent work.
Global find-replace with theme token mapping. Independent.
New story files for existing components. Can run in parallel with all other ACs.
Existing voice story files need RNText→Paper and hex→token replacements. Independent.
Must extract AFTER AC-71 fixes are applied, or extraction will capture broken code.
Audit and fix across components. Can be parallelized by component file.

uiUxRisks.risk: Storybook stories may not render correctly with current theme token structure
uiUxRisks.mitigation: Run Storybook build after first 3 story files are created to verify decorators and theme providers work. Fix issues before bulk story creation.

uiUxRisks.risk: placeholderTextColor fixes may break in dark mode if HSL conversion is incorrect
uiUxRisks.mitigation: Test placeholder visibility in both light and dark modes for all affected inputs. Create a test screen with all input variants before committing.

uiUxRisks.risk: PLATFORM_COLORS extraction may break if category names don't match exactly
uiUxRisks.mitigation: Use a Record with a fallback default color. Add unit tests for the color lookup function.

uiUxRisks.risk: Pressable accessibility audit scope is large (87 files with Pressable/TouchableOpacity)
uiUxRisks.mitigation: Focus on high-traffic interactive components first (cards, list items, buttons). Create a checklist sorted by usage frequency. Can be shipped incrementally.

uiUxRisks.risk: Voice story decorator fixes touch 7 story files with hardcoded RNText imports
uiUxRisks.mitigation: Create a shared story decorator file that handles Paper Text imports properly, then update all voice stories to use it.

uiUxRisks.risk: ThemePreviewCard extraction may break if ThemeSync or ColorSchemeProvider dependencies aren't preserved
uiUxRisks.mitigation: Verify all context imports are included in extracted component. Test theme switching in both light and dark modes after extraction.

testSteps: Open app in light mode, navigate to Settings screen
Verify theme preview cards show correct colors (no arbitrary hex)
Toggle between light/dark/system themes
Verify all theme transitions are smooth and colors match preview
Navigate to various screens (chat, research, subscriptions)
Verify no hardcoded colors visible (no white/black on wrong backgrounds)
humanTestableDeliverables.acceptance: All theme preview cards use semantic token classes. Dark mode toggle works without color glitches.

testSteps: Run Storybook (pnpm storybook or equivalent)
Navigate to UI primitives section
Verify Button, Card, Badge, Input stories exist
Verify each story has Default and AllVariants exports
Check voice stories use Paper Text component
Verify all colors use theme tokens (no hardcoded hex in stories)
humanTestableDeliverables.acceptance: All key UI primitives have stories with variants. Voice stories use Paper Text. Zero hardcoded colors in story decorators.

testSteps: Enable screen reader (VoiceOver/TalkBack)
Navigate to conversation list
Long-press a conversation, verify delete button is announced
Navigate to result cards and feed items
Verify each interactive element announces its purpose
Verify all buttons have accessibilityRole='button' set
Verify all cards with onPress have descriptive accessibilityLabel
humanTestableDeliverables.acceptance: Screen reader announces all interactive elements meaningfully. No generic 'button' or 'element' labels without context.

testSteps: Open Shop screen, verify retailer badges show correct brand colors
Open social posts view, verify platform color stripes match brands
Check NavigationTooltip has correct border color in dark mode
Verify ScreenHeader centers title even with long text
Check CategoryBadge shows distinct colors for different categories
humanTestableDeliverables.acceptance: All platform/retailer colors use shared constants. Dark mode borders render correctly. Title centering is robust.

effortEstimates.rationale: Two files, simple hex→token replacement. Delete button affordances are isolated.
Settings screen has 3 theme options with arbitrary Tailwind values. Map to existing global.css tokens. Test in both modes.
Create new lib/constants/platform-colors.ts file. Update imports in 2 files. Add fallback color for safety.
Single file (ShopListingCard.tsx). Consolidate retailer color object. Remove dark/light duplication. Add theme-aware fallback.
5 files with placeholderTextColor issues. Fix broken HSL syntax. Add dark mode variants. Test all inputs in both themes.
Create stories for Button, Card, Badge, Input, and other key UI primitives (~8-10 components). Each needs Default + AllVariants exports with proper decorators.
7 voice story files need RNText→Paper import and hex→token replacements. Batch find-replace with verification.
Extract ThemePreviewCard to components/settings/ with proper exports. Create co-located .stories.tsx. Update imports in settings screen.
Single file (screen-header.tsx). Replace min-w side-zone with flex-1 centering. Test with long titles.
Single hardcoded border color in NavigationTooltip. Replace with border-border class.
87 files with Pressable/TouchableOpacity. Focus on high-traffic components (~30 files). Add accessibilityRole and accessibilityLabel to each.
CategoryBadge component needs variant mapping expansion. Research existing categories, map to distinct visual treatments.

parallelizationOpportunities.reason: All are independent color/token fixes in different files. No shared dependencies.
AC-75 creates new UI primitive stories. AC-76 fixes existing voice stories. Different directories, no conflicts.
AC-77 extracts ThemePreviewCard. AC-78 fixes ScreenHeader. AC-81 expands CategoryBadge. Different components.
Large but isolated work. Can be split by component directory (chat/, subscriptions/, voice/, etc.).
Independent work on placeholderTextColor. Can be done while other sprints run.

section210Dependencies.reason: AC-62 extracts NarrationBlockWrapper from article-detail.tsx. While primarily code organization, any UI work in article-detail should coordinate to avoid merge conflicts.

gaps: Missing Storybook stories for core UI primitives (Button, Card, Badge, Input)
Hardcoded colors in delete affordances (ConversationRow, SwipeableRow)
Theme preview cards use arbitrary Tailwind values
Voice story decorators use RNText instead of Paper Text
strengths: Well-defined theme token system in global.css and lib/theme.ts
Existing semantic color tokens (primary, destructive, muted, etc.)
Strong Storybook adoption across feature components (50+ story files)
Good accessibility baseline in some components (ConversationRow has full a11y)
designSystemReadiness.recommendation: Design system work (AC-70 to AC-81) can run in parallel with backend work (Sections 2.2-2.6, 2.9). No blocking dependencies. UI work is isolated to component files and doesn't touch Convex schema or queries.
